Distillation Column Efficiency %
==================================================

.. math::

   \text{}

.. raw:: html

   <table class="kpi-table">
      <tbody>
         <tr>
            <td>Description</td>
            <td><ul><li>Distillation Column Efficiency % measures the effectiveness of a distillation column in separating components based on their volatility</li><li>It is calculated by comparing the theoretical number of stages required for separation to the actual number of stages achieved during operation</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Objective</td>
            <td><ul><li>The objective of this KPI is to assess the performance of the distillation column</li><li>identify potential inefficiencies</li><li>and optimize the separation process to enhance overall productivity</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Formula</td>
            <td>
               <p>The KPI is calculated by dividing the theoretical number of stages by the actual number of stages, then multiplying the result by 100 to express it as a percentage.</p>
               <div class="math-equation">$$ \mathit{Distillation\,Column\,Efficiency\,\%} = \mathit{0))} \times \mathit{100} $$</div>
            </td>
         </tr>

         <tr>
            <td>Generation time</td>
            <td>
               1m 15s (AI 1m 15s + Render 0.0s)
               <div style="font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; margin-top: 4px;">
                  Total: 75.372s
                  • AI: 75.372s
                  • Render: 0.0s
               </div>
            </td>
         </tr>

         <tr>
            <td>Extraction rate %</td>
            <td>100.0%</td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Error rate %</td>
            <td>0.0%</td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Used in KPI(s)</td>
            <td><ul><li>This KPI is used in evaluating the operational efficiency of distillation processes within the oil</li><li>gas</li><li>and petrochemical industries</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Input Measure</td>
            <td><ul><li>Theoretical stages and actual stages are the primary input measures for this KPI</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Unit of Measure</td>
            <td>The unit of measure for Distillation Column Efficiency % is percentage.</td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Reporting Source</td>
            <td>The data for this KPI is typically sourced from operational performance reports and process control systems.</td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Comments</td>
            <td>A higher percentage indicates better efficiency, while a lower percentage suggests potential issues in the distillation process that may require investigation and corrective actions.</td>
         </tr>
      </tbody>
   </table>

.. admonition:: Code Context
   :class: dropdown

   
   
   

   .. code-block:: sql
      :linenos:
   
      :emphasize-lines: 1
   

      -- KPI: Distillation Column Efficiency %
   SELECT (theoretical_stages / NULLIF(actual_stages,0)) * 100 AS [Distillation Column Efficiency %]
   FROM (SELECT 45.0 AS theoretical_stages, 50.0 AS actual_stages) c;
